GenMac v0.0.8

USAGE
  dotnet GenMac.dll [options]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  asp.ui            
  csp.model         

You can run `dotnet GenMac.dll [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
GenMac v0.0.8

USAGE
  dotnet GenMac.dll asp.ui <namespacename> <modelname> <attributes...> [options]

PARAMETERS
* namespacename     Namespace of class. 
* modelname         Name of class. 
* attributes        List of attributes with datatype. 

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
GenMac v0.0.8

USAGE
  dotnet GenMac.dll csp.model <namespacename> <modelname> <attributes...> [options]

PARAMETERS
* namespacename     Namespace of class. 
* modelname         Name of class. 
* attributes        List of attributes with datatype. 

OPTIONS
  -a|--audit        Include audit fields. Default: "True".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
